query: SELECT id, businessName, businessType, rating, reviewCount, referralCount, totalCommissionEarned, tier, serviceArea FROM partners WHERE status='approved' AND rating >= 4.0 ORDER BY rating DESC, reviewCount DESC LIMIT 6
